## LibraryRuntime.RuntimeChocolateIngredient class

A resolved view of a chocolate ingredient with navigation capabilities. Immutable - does not allow modification of underlying data.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare class RuntimeChocolateIngredient extends RuntimeIngredientBase implements IChocolateIngredient 
```
**Extends:** [RuntimeIngredientBase](./ts-chocolate.libraryruntime.runtimeingredientbase.md)

**Implements:** [IChocolateIngredient](./ts-chocolate.libraryruntime.ichocolateingredient.md)

## Remarks

The constructor for this class is marked as internal. Third-party code should not call the constructor directly or create subclasses that extend the `RuntimeChocolateIngredient` class.
